title: chrysosplenium tenellum
intro: Chrysosplenium tenellum, also known as the slender spleenwort or low golden saxifrage, is a species of flowering plant in the family Saxifragaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Chrysosplenium tenellum include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and supporting cardiovascular health. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
